notes: Case 0 is a real auto-transcript (KhewJiaPeng) graded on invariants + spot-checked term corrections, since the speaker's own polish may differ from the skill's. Cases 1-2 are synthetic: a contiguous excerpt of a real polished talk SRT is the gold answer, and the raw input is that gold with a documented set of fillers, stutters, and phonetic term errors injected (see each fixture's answer-key.json). That makes every injected error individually checkable.

evals.name: real-fulllength-khewjiapeng
evals.prompt: Can you polish the subtitles for my talk? The raw transcript and the slide deck are in agentic/evals/subtitle-polish/fixtures/khewjiapeng-real/ — khewjiapeng.en.raw.srt is the auto-generated SRT, and slides/ plus slides.pdf are the deck. Clean it up and save the polished version next to it.
evals.expected_output: A polished SRT (raw marker dropped from the stem) that strips fillers/stutters and fixes mis-transcribed terms against the slides, while holding the invariants: no empty cues, contiguous numbering (cues may be dropped+renumbered but no holes), surviving cues keep their original timestamps, UTF-8 without BOM. The speaker mangles 'IaC' many ways (IAC, ISC, ISA, ICNA, 'I a C', 'I C') and 'Azure portal' ('Asia bottle'); these should converge to the slide-canonical forms.
assertions: Output SRT exists with the .raw marker removed from the stem
Output parses as valid SRT (index, timing, body per cue)
No empty cues in the output
Cue numbering is contiguous from 1 with no holes
Every output cue's timestamp is present in the input (no timestamps invented or shifted)
Output is UTF-8 without a BOM
Filler density (standalone um/uh/like-fillers) is lower in the output than in the raw input
The term 'IaC' appears in slide-canonical form and the mis-hearings (IAC/ISC/ISA/ICNA/'I a C') are gone
'Azure portal' is recovered from 'Asia bottle' / 'Azure service' mis-transcriptions where context supports it
Affirmations and Singlish particles (lah/ya) are preserved, not scrubbed

evals.name: synth-sohjunwei-excerpt
evals.prompt: I have a rough auto-transcript excerpt from a talk that needs cleaning up — fillers and some wrong technical terms. The file is agentic/evals/subtitle-polish/fixtures/sohjunwei-synth/sohjunwei-synth.en.raw.srt and the talk's slides are in the slides/ folder next to it. Please polish it and save the result alongside.
evals.expected_output: Polished SRT matching the gold (sohjunwei-synth.en.srt.gold). All 13 injected errors fixed: term mis-hearings corrected to slide-canonical (Herpes agent->Hermes agent x2, telegraph->Telegram x2, EMCP->MCP x2), injected standalone fillers removed (um, uh, you know, like x4), injected duplicate-word stutters collapsed (so so, the the, of of). Invariants held: 43 contiguous cues, no empties, timestamps unchanged, UTF-8 no BOM. Restraint: the speaker's own term 'OpenClaw' is left as-is (the slides say 'OpenRouter', but that is the speaker's word, not a transcription error).
assertions: Output SRT exists with the .raw marker removed from the stem
Output has 43 contiguous cues with no empties and no holes
Every cue's timestamp is unchanged from the raw input
Output is UTF-8 without a BOM
'Herpes agent' is corrected to 'Hermes agent' (both occurrences)
'telegraph' is corrected to 'Telegram' (both occurrences)
'EMCP' is corrected to 'MCP' (both occurrences)
All 4 injected fillers (um, uh, you know, and the inline 'like') are removed
All 3 injected stutters (so so, the the, of of) are collapsed
Restraint: 'OpenClaw' is preserved and NOT rewritten to the slide term 'OpenRouter'

evals.name: synth-kowajialiang-excerpt
evals.prompt: This SRT is from an auto-transcribed meetup talk and the transcription garbled a few product names and added some stutters. File: agentic/evals/subtitle-polish/fixtures/kowajialiang-synth/kowajialiang-synth.en.raw.srt. The deck is in the slides/ folder beside it. Clean it up for me and write the polished file next to the raw one.
evals.expected_output: Polished SRT matching the gold (kowajialiang-synth.en.srt.gold). All 10 injected errors fixed: term mis-hearings corrected to slide-canonical (NCP->MCP x2, cloud->Claude x2, Jason->JSON), injected fillers removed (um, like, uh), injected stutters collapsed (AI AI->AI, for for->for). Invariants held: 24 contiguous cues, no empties, timestamps unchanged, UTF-8 no BOM. Restraint: Singlish particle 'ya' and affirmation 'okay' preserved.
assertions: Output SRT exists with the .raw marker removed from the stem
Output has 24 contiguous cues with no empties and no holes
Every cue's timestamp is unchanged from the raw input
Output is UTF-8 without a BOM
'NCP' is corrected to 'MCP' (both occurrences)
'cloud' is corrected to 'Claude' (both occurrences, where it means the product)
'Jason' is corrected to 'JSON'
All 3 injected fillers (um, like, uh) are removed
All 2 injected stutters (AI AI, for for) are collapsed
Restraint: 'ya' and 'okay' are preserved, not scrubbed as filler
